title: [Connections][Filter]: switch between filter results by Up/Down arrow keys
author: PetbkA
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
When using filter in _Connections_ tree (_Options → Connections → Filter search matches in connection tree_), choosing the connection from the result via _Up/Down_ arrow keys is possible only after switching the focus to _Connections_ tree by clicking it or pressing _Tab_.

Meanwhile Up/Down arrow keys work OK if filter is disabled.

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!-...

iterations.description: Implement keyboard navigation for filtered connection results in the connection tree to improve user experience.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): Implement keyboard navigation for filtered connection results in the connection tree to improve user experience.
Approach: Modify ConnectionTree.cs to handle Up/Down arrow key presses when a filter is active, and update the selection based on the filtered results provided by ConnectionTreeSearchTextFilter.cs.
